scripts.build: npm run clean && trap 'rm -f dist/my_ai_web/.dev.vars dist/my_ai_web/.dev.vars.*' EXIT INT TERM && vite build
scripts.preview: npm run build && cp .dev.vars dist/my_ai_web/.dev.vars && trap 'rm -f dist/my_ai_web/.dev.vars' EXIT INT TERM && wrangler dev --config dist/my_ai_web/wrangler.json --port 4173
scripts.e2e:dev: env -u HTTP_PROXY -u HTTPS_PROXY -u ALL_PROXY rm -rf .wrangler/state && env -u HTTP_PROXY -u HTTPS_PROXY -u ALL_PROXY npm run db:migrate:local && env -u HTTP_PROXY -u HTTPS_PROXY -u ALL_PROXY vite --port=3100 --host=0.0.0.0
scripts.e2e: env -u HTTP_PROXY -u HTTPS_PROXY -u ALL_PROXY playwright test
scripts.e2e:headed: env -u HTTP_PROXY -u HTTPS_PROXY -u ALL_PROXY playwright test --headed
